description: Traces vectors head-to-tail in 2D. Requires at least 2 vectors.
utility: Draw a head-to-tail chain of 2D vectors

arguments.name: vectors
arguments.description: Two or more vector variable references to chain head-to-tail

arguments.name: styles
arguments.description: Optional: c(), s() for color and stroke styling

alternates.syntax: vectortrace(G, v1, v2, v3, size(0.3), c(red))
alternates.description: Trace with custom arrow size and color

examples.expression:
G = g2d(at(10,10), size(25), range(-6, 6), type(geometry))
v1 = vector(G, point(G, 0, 0), point(G, 3, 1))
v2 = vector(G, point(G, 0, 0), point(G, 1, 2))
vectortrace(G, v1, v2)

G = g2d(at(10,10), size(25), range(-6, 6), type(geometry))
v1 = vector(G, point(G, 0, 0), point(G, 2, 0))
v2 = vector(G, point(G, 0, 0), point(G, 0, 3))
v3 = vector(G, point(G, 0, 0), point(G, 1, 1))
vectortrace(G, v1, v2, v3, size(0.3), c(red))
